modmenu.description.better-bats: Overhauls bats with flocking, guano production, and ecological niche behaviors.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_swarm_size.desc: Maximum number of bats allowed in a single flock.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_guano_threshold: Ticks required for a resting bat to produce guano (Lower is faster).
gamerule.better-bats.bat_pest_control.de: If true, bats will hunt silverfish and endermites.
gamerule.better-bats.bat_alignment.descr: How strongly bats align their flight direction with the swarm (0-100). Default: 5
gamerule.better-bats.bat_cohesion.descri: How strongly bats are pulled towards the center of the swarm (0-100). Default: 5
gamerule.better-bats.bat_separation.desc: How strongly bats avoid colliding with each other (0-100). Default: 10
